name: chain_day_200_just_hit_12k_in_revenue_it_st
method: Day 200. Just hit $12k in revenue. It still feels unreal. About 7 months ago I launched [my tool](https://www.tydal.co/). Its a tool that monitors Reddit for people looking for something you offer and

stages.task: run reddit_deep_scraper.py on 41 subreddits, filter posts <24h old with buying-intent keywords (looking for, need, recommend, alternative to, best tool for)
score each thread 1-10 on purchase intent, match to our products (apps, digital products, services), discard score<5
draft helpful reply for each qualified thread: lead with value/answer, mention relevant PRINTMAXX product naturally, include link only if subreddit allows, no shill tone
queue approved replies for human posting via CONTENT/social/posting_queue/reddit_replies.txt, track which threads replied to in LEDGER to avoid double-posting
